questions.question: Paul warns the Corinthians using examples from which period of Israel's history?
Paul says you cannot drink the cup of the Lord and the cup of whom?
Paul says God will not let you be tempted beyond what you can bear.
So whether you eat or drink, or whatever you do, do all to the _____ of God.
No temptation has taken you except what is common to man. God is _____ and will not allow you to be tempted above what you are able.
